title: GVEA’s Quarterly Fuel & Purchased Power Rate Change – In effect through June 1.
summary: Golden Valley Electric Association (GVEA)’s Fuel and Purchased Power rate, which is updated quarterly, increased by 2.942¢ on March 1, from $0.09164/kWh to $0.12106/kWh.

title: Tribe celebrates Easter with gathering
summary: The Easter Bunny (sometimes known as Santa Claus or Jonny Wilson) poses for a photo with Chantilly Baye’s baby Gretta Hileman during the Easter party. This year’s Easter party was truly a multi-generational event as Kenaitze and Salamatof families gathered for the annual celebration. The Tribe’s Traditional V...
